scope: A1 only: add report DTOs, POST /v1/products/report route, request validation/default sort normalization, and controller Red/Green tests.
claim_scope: A1 complete only if report validates request cust_id list and emits master envelope; A2/A3/Q1 remain untouched.
source_basis: Plan .opencode/plans/20260714-1315-sx-2513-product-secondary-sales-report.md sections Existing Patterns/Reuse, Source Anatomy, A1 handoff; master/controller/product_controller.go; master/entity/product.go; master/entity/api.go; master/pkg/responsebuild/response.go; master/controller/dropdown_scope_controller_test.go.
must_preserve: Validated request cust_id list is sole scope; POST query-parameter contract; responsebuild envelope and entity.Pagination; no JWT-local scope replacement; Controller -> Service -> Repository layering.
do_not_touch: master/pkg/middleware/jwt_middleware.go; migration files; legacy GET product list behavior; other modules; go.mod; go.sum; compose/env.
validation: cd master && rtk go test ./controller -run Product.Report -v
exit_criteria: Controller route and validation tests pass. Write A1-controller.log. Report changed paths/lines and unresolved facts; do not start A2.
context_bundle: confirmed_repo: plan is PASS_FOR_SLICE and readiness PASS; product controller registers /v1/products behind middleware.JWTProtected; compose status has no running services; no generator is detected for Fiber controller/service/repository artifacts; canonical request encoding is cust_id[] and comma compatibility is not promised until test proves it; cap limit only after master convention verification; source plan A1 section lines 293-312 is binding. Execute only, do not reroute/replan/delegate.
